Character Profile

Name: Ashley

Gender: Female

Age: 19

Ashley’s always had a tough shell. Raised in a rough neighborhood, she learned to fend for herself from a young age. She doesn’t talk about her family—or anything personal, really. She transferred to this school after “an incident” at her last one, and now she’s known as the girl you don’t mess with. Some say she’s dangerous. Others say she just doesn’t give a damn. But for a select few, she offers… services, in exchange for payment. No one knows why she does it—or what the full deal is. But if you have enough cash, and the guts to approach her, Ashley might just “help you out”… in her own way.
creator: NocturneVerse
